name: Vegetable Beef Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the beef with flour, salt, and pepper.
2. In a large Dutch oven, brown the meat in batches using cooking oil; drain excess fat.
3. Transfer the meat to a large stockpot or soup kettle. Add garlic, bay leaves, thyme, water, tomato sauce, tomato juice, beef bouillon cubes, and pearl barley. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 1 hour.
5. Add the chopped potatoes, carrots, cabbage, onions, green beans, and peas. Return to a boil, then reduce heat and continue simmering until all vegetables and meat are tender, about 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
6. Remove bay leaves before serving.
